e2e-conductor-agent.description: DEPRECATED 2026-04-24. Queue-based dispatch design is platform-incompatible (subagents cannot spawn other subagents, per Anthropic docs). Use /test-pipeline or /e2e-visual-run; Phase 3.1 will dissolve this agent into /e2e-visual-run body at T0.
e2e-conductor-agent.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release - async queue-based E2E orchestration pipeline. v2.0.0: absorbed user-facing modes from e2e-visual-run. Promoted to must-have 2026-04-23 so `testing-pipeline-master-agent` (must-have) does not have a dangling Agent() dispatch under default provisioning. v2.2.0 (2026-04-24): deprecated — platform does not forward Agent to dispatched subagents; Phase 3.1 will restructure /e2e-visual-run as skill-at-T0.

e2e-visual-run.changelog:
v3.0.0: BREAKING - scope reduced to Playwright only (Cypress/Selenium/Detox/Flutter removed). Added expected_changes queue, git-status pre-check in Step 6, flakiness decay/probe-run rule, section filter semantics, PID-safety and port-in-use guards.
v4.0.0: Thin wrapper that dispatches e2e-conductor-agent. Promoted to must-have 2026-04-23 alongside its agent-backed implementation.
v1.0.0: Initial release - queue-based orchestration, dual-signal verification, 8-classification healing.

pipeline-fix-pr.description: Land pipeline fixer diffs on a new branch pipeline-fixes/{run_id} and open one PR (vs N commits on working branch). Wraps /serialize-fixes for atomic diff apply; adds branch creation + push + gh pr create. Never auto-merges. REQ-C003 of test-pipeline-three-lane spec.

prompt-auto-enhance.description: Grade and strengthen non-trivial prompts using a 6-dimension rubric, then diagnose weak dimensions against 11 failure categories with severity-prioritized fixes and 3 guardrails. Also handles resource CRUD batch approval and prompt reliability scoring.

prompt-auto-enhance-rule.description: Global rule that auto-enhances every prompt with context gathering and prompt grading. Delegates to /prompt-auto-enhance skill for the full pipeline. Contains the Clarification Gate and CRUD detection trigger.
prompt-auto-enhance-rule.changelog: v2.0.0: Slim from 97 to 48 lines. Removed duplicated procedural content. Now a lean trigger delegating to /prompt-auto-enhance skill. Fixes SSOT violation.

prompt-enhance-reminder.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release â€” deterministic Enhanced indicator reminder

prompt-logger.description: UserPromptSubmit hook that appends every user prompt to .claude/tasks/prompts.md as Markdown entries for local session history. Non-blocking; never writes to stdout.
prompt-logger.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release — append-only Markdown log via UserPromptSubmit hook. Gitignored live log; seed template ships via provisioning.

serialize-fixes.description: Apply unified-diff files sequentially to the working tree using atomic three-phase protocol (git apply --check then git apply then git commit). Use when multiple parallel fixers produced diffs that need to land on a shared branch without conflicts. Discards stale diffs on conflict; resets working tree on partial failure.

test-data-management.description: Manage test data across Python and TypeScript projects using factories, fakers, seeders, builders, and fixtures.

test-failure-analyzer-agent.description: Use proactively to diagnose test failures — reads test output, classifies by root cause, and suggests targeted fixes. Spawn automatically whenever tests fail to provide immediate
test-failure-analyzer-agent.changelog: v2.3.0: REQ-S004 — recommended_action now config-driven via auto_heal: block in test-pipeline.yml (was LLM-recalled from spec). Adds explicit read procedure, ALLOWED enum (AUTO_HEAL/AUTO_HEAL_WITH_FLAG/ISSUE_ONLY/QUARANTINE/RETRY_INFRA), and fail-safe fallback to ISSUE_ONLY on missing/invalid config. Backward compatible for callers.

test-healer-agent.description: Classification-driven E2E test failure healer: diagnoses via fix-loop, applies targeted fixes, 3-attempt cap per test
test-healer-agent.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release - 8-classification targeted healing with 3-attempt cap. v2.0.0: Playwright MCP hard dep, Constitution at top. Promoted to must-have 2026-04-23 so `e2e-conductor-agent` (now must-have) has its T3 worker available by default.

test-knowledge.description: Manage a self-improving knowledge base of testing patterns and lessons learned. Use when debugging test failures, choosing fixtures, handling platform quirks, or recording a resolved test issue.

test-maintenance.description: Audit, clean up, and optimize a test suite. Identifies dead tests, duplicates, slow tests, and readability issues.

test-pipeline.description: Full test verification pipeline: fix failures, verify changes, review visual proof, commit. Thin wrapper dispatching test-pipeline-agent.
test-pipeline.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release â€” preamble added, registry sync, dependencies declared

test-pipeline-agent.description: DEPRECATED 2026-04-24. Three-lane design (scout + Wave 1 functional+API parallel + Wave 2 UI + T2B triage, all via nested Agent()) is platform-incompatible (Anthropic docs: subagents cannot spawn other subagents). Use /test-pipeline instead; Phase 3 will dissolve into skill-at-T0.

test-scout-agent.description: E2E test runner: executes tests, captures failure screenshots and accessibility tree snapshots, queues results for async verification
test-scout-agent.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release - failure-only screenshots, per-test a11y snapshots. v2.0.0: every-test screenshot capture, Constitution at top. Promoted to must-have 2026-04-23 so `e2e-conductor-agent` (now must-have) has its T3 worker available by default.

tester-agent.description: Senior QA engineer specializing in comprehensive testing and quality assurance. For UI tests, orchestrates per-test screenshot verification where the screenshot

testing.changelog: v2.2.0: Add FIRST principles mnemonic section at top | v2.0.0: Genericized and restructured

testing-pipeline-master-agent.description: DEPRECATED 2026-04-24. T1 workflow master design that dispatches T2 sub-orchestrators via Agent() is platform-incompatible (Anthropic docs: subagents cannot spawn other subagents). Use /test-pipeline instead; Phase 3 will dissolve into skill-at-T0 body.
testing-pipeline-master-agent.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release — testing pipeline orchestration with screenshot authority. v2.0.0 (2026-04-22): promoted to must-have — T1 orchestrator must match its must-have T2 child test-pipeline-agent for the full workflow to be provisioned coherently. E2E sub-step auto-skips when no_ui_tests so non-Playwright projects absorb zero overhead. v3.1.0 (2026-04-24): deprecated — platform does not support nested Agent() dispatch; Phase 3 will dissolve into /test-pipeline skill body at T0.

testing-pipeline-workflow.description: Run the legacy full-verification chain via testing-pipeline-master-agent. DEPRECATED 2026-04-24 — use /test-pipeline instead; this wrapper's dispatched agent has a tiered design that cannot execute on current Claude Code (subagents cannot spawn other subagents, per Anthropic docs).
testing-pipeline-workflow.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release. v1.3.0 (2026-04-24): deprecated — replaced by /test-pipeline per subagent-dispatch-platform-limit remediation Phase 1.

trace-test.description: Validate distributed traces with OpenTelemetry and Tracetest by asserting on spans instead of just HTTP responses — verify downstream calls, latency per span, error propagation, and correlation ID flow. Use when testing microservice integration and observability.

Use when planning, building, reviewing, or optimizing UI/UX for web and mobile applications.
